---
description: "Create a new pipeline project folder with minimal starter files."
---

# New Project Scaffold (Simple Mode)

## Create These Files
- 0-IDEA.md
- PIPELINE-STATUS.md
- X-Journal.md
- deploy.sh
- .env.deploy

## Do Not Create
Do not create stage artifact files (1..12 outputs). Those are stage-owned.
